name: veta-trading-platform
description: VETA Trading Platform — real-time market simulation with algorithmic trading strategies.

scripts.lint: deno task lint && cd frontend && npm run lint
scripts.typecheck: deno task check && cd frontend && npm run typecheck
scripts.test: deno task test && cd frontend && npm run test:unit -- --run
scripts.test:e2e: cd frontend && npm run build && npm run test:ui
